title: Being boycotted/ignored — CIEE Saanya/Natalie froze out, sister visit incoming
html:
Being boycotted/ignored — CIEE Saanya/Natalie froze out, sister visit incoming

Source: 2024-10-03 Google Doc. Mid-Shanghai study abroad doc covering two unrelated threads — sister visit excitement and CIEE social-friction processing.

TL;DR

  • The good news: sister is coming to visit Yahir in Shanghai. After being solo for so long, this "feels surreal." Plans to dial in a great itinerary; framed as natural that she'll have to put in more effort because she's the one traveling.
  • The locking-in self-pep: "I need to start locking in, one thing go hard, then the next, then the next. One thing at a time seriously lock the fuck in mate."
  • The CIEE social-friction: being boycotted/ignored by Saanya and Natalie despite strategic re-engagement attempts. Sent funny "alley oop" texts to Saanya, asked Natalie about her research paper — both no response.
  • The Saanya backstory: thinks she's mad about "the time I ran away with her bag, and Camryn chased after me." Yahir thought it was playful; willing to apologize, but draws a line: "if I have to feel like I am walking on egg shells with anyone, then this is the wrong relationship straight up."
  • The Saanya appraisal: "first desi indian girl that I have liked" — explicit ethnic marker. Believes she wants more honesty.
  • The Owen-channeled lesson (= Owen Davis): "I need to be more honest to myself and others. If I have a feeling I should express it. No need to play stupid games all the time. You claim you like these games, but this is only because this is the only thing that you are really known. Games are tiring and lead to worse outcomes compared to if you were just honest."
  • The Natalie diagnosis: "foundationally doesn't resonate or FW with you. It's one of those misaligned attention things where there is little that you can do about it. Someone has the initially like towards you or they don't."
  • Closer: "Be authentic with everyone and always unleash your aura… goodbye for now, YG."

Pattern observed

This doc is the honesty-vs-games inflection in Yahir's relational thinking — Owen's channeled wisdom becomes a permanent operating principle that reappears in the Aug 2025 Emily doc and the Jan 2026 love letter (both lean on direct expression vs strategic game-playing).

The "walking on eggshells = wrong relationship" line is a personal axiom Yahir crystallizes here — same logic he later applies to Cam in the Aug 2025 IRL Lore Tab 7 critique, and to his dad (lack of effort as disqualifying).

The Saanya/Natalie/Camryn cluster is a one-doc social network — three CIEE cohort names that don't appear elsewhere in the corpus. Worth flagging if any reappear.

Key quotes

  • "If you feel like you are walking on egg shells something has to changed or you are in the wrong relationship straight up."
  • "I need to be more honest to myself and others. If I have a feeling I should express it. No need to play stupid games all the time."
  • "Be authentic with everyone and always unleash your aura."

Open questions

  • Did the sister visit happen? (Single forward-looking mention; no follow-up doc found.)
  • Saanya, Natalie, Camryn — CIEE cohort; identities not yet stubbed (single mention each).
  • The "running away with her bag" incident — what actually happened? Doc treats it as obviously playful but suggests Camryn chasing made it weird.
